# Widget Pro

Widget Pro is our flagship enterprise solution for widget management.

## Overview
Widget Pro helps enterprises manage millions of widgets at scale with
real-time tracking, analytics, and automation.

## Key Features
- Real-time widget tracking and monitoring
- Multi-tenant architecture for enterprise customers
- API-first design with comprehensive REST and GraphQL APIs
- SOC2 compliant security

## Pricing
Enterprise pricing starts at $10,000/month for up to 1M widgets.
Contact sales for custom pricing on larger deployments.

## Technical Requirements
- Node.js 18+ or compatible runtime
- PostgreSQL 14+ for data storage
- Redis for caching layer
